name: Larry Gales
abstract: Lawrence Bernard Gales (March 25, 1936 – September 12, 1995) was an American jazz double-bassist.

concerts.label: Benefit Concert for the Student Nonviolent Coordinating Committee

about_quotes.speaker: Charles Thompson
about_quotes.evidence: I have two fine musicians who are going to work with me. Larry Gale on the bass... who I became to know since I've been back here.

about_quotes.speaker: Jon Hendricks
about_quotes.evidence: So Ben Riley and Larry Gales – I sang it. I was singing it for them.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jon Hendricks — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
